Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David G. Yen, Esq. appeared with petitioner Richard Pence, Jr., who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Adrian Pence, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Iliana Hernandez, the minor's mother, was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $105,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $25,113.22.
Medical Expenses 12,471.69.
Costs - $4,548.00.

The net balance of $62,867.09 shall be invested in a single-premium deferred annuity subject to withdrawal only on Order of the Court. The terms and conditions of the annuity are set forth in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
